name: Back Country Ham Slice for 6
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the ham in fat until crispy.
2. Remove the ham slice from the skillet and set aside.
3. In the same skillet, combine the remaining ingredients: prepared mustard, brown sugar, salt, paprika, and water.
4. Cook the mixture for 5 minutes over low heat.
5. Place the ham slice back into the sauce and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Serve. Serves 3.
